items.scenario: You booked a small-group cooking class for this Friday through a local culinary studio. The confirmation says the class covers pasta, but the website you registered on advertised a seafood menu, and you want the seafood session.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Nakamura. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the mismatch between the confirmation and the website
Describe which session you meant to book
Ask how the studio can move you to the seafood class
items.subject: Getting into the seafood cooking class this Friday

items.scenario: You are a third-year history major writing a senior thesis this year. Your assigned advisor is on leave until spring, and you would like guidance on narrowing your topic before the proposal deadline in three weeks.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Halloran. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe your thesis topic and where you feel stuck
Ask whether he can advise you while your advisor is away
Explain the proposal deadline you are working toward
items.subject: Thesis guidance while my advisor is on leave

items.scenario: You bought a wireless keyboard online last month, and several keys have already stopped responding. The store page promised a full one-year warranty, but the support form on their site keeps rejecting your order number whenever you try to file a claim.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Osei. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problem with the keyboard
Explain the trouble you had with the support form
Ask how to start a warranty replacement
items.subject: Warranty claim blocked by your support form

items.scenario: You and a few friends planned a weekend camping trip, and you offered to bring the tents. You just learned that two of your tents are damaged, so the group may not have enough shelter for everyone.
items.direction: Write an email to Theo. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the problem with the tents you were bringing
Ask whether anyone else can bring a spare tent
Offer to look into renting one if needed
items.subject: Tent problem before our camping trip
